nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 東開普省
nodes.summary: 東開普省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Blue korhaan、Fynbos buttonquail、Damara tern等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Marsh owl
nodes.summary: Marsh owl（Marsh owl，学名 Asio capensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于東開普省，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are common in the grasslands of southern Africa, occurring in the northern regions of South Africa down to the province of the Eastern Cape. They are also found in Zimbabwe on the Mashonaland plateau, and in the Makgadikgadi lacustrine depression in Botswana. They have also been recorded on the floodplains on the Namibian coast and in isolated populations in Morocco and Madagascar

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The marsh owl's habitat preference is open grassland, marshlands and short scrub,Harrison, J.A., Allan, D.G., Underhill, L.G., Herremans, M., Tree, A.J., Parker, V

links.label: 栖息于
